name: Airsculpt Technologies, Inc.
summary: AirSculpt Technologies, Inc. operates body contouring centers offering a proprietary minimally invasive fat removal procedure called AirSculpt. The company targets patients seeking aesthetic body sculpting services without traditional liposuction. It operates multiple centers across various U.S. states and focuses on expanding its center footprint, optimizing marketing, and offering consumer financing options for its elective cosmetic procedures.

products.name: AirSculpt
products.description: Proprietary minimally invasive body contouring and fat removal procedure performed at company-operated centers.
